behaviors.description: Block saving a PASS review summary when stored findings for the same review round contain any FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module boundary (summary-write path must query findings store for same round). REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required; in-process DB/repo is enough. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: no. Rejected higher levels: behavior text is only about stored verdict cross-check during save, not live agent/model execution.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary service + findings repository (test DB). Seed round R with one dimension FAIL. Attempt to persist PASS summary for R. Assert write is rejected with validation error and summary record is not stored.

behaviors.description: Compute stop-gate verdict from stored per-dimension findings, not from handwritten summary text alone.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: bug occurs when gate data-source wiring prefers summary text over findings store. Needs cross-module integration (gate + repository). REAL-INFRA: no real external infra required. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: no. Rejected higher levels: behavior text explicitly targets data source selection in gate computation, not model output.
behaviors.test_description: Seed stored findings for round R with at least one FAIL, and store contradictory summary text saying all PASS. Run stop-gate computation. Assert final verdict is FAIL/BLOCK based on findings and includes evidence from stored dimension verdicts.

behaviors.description: Require explicit override flag for manual summary overrides and emit an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: requires interaction between summary update path, authorization/flag handling, and audit log persistence. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network needed. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: no. Rejected higher levels: behavior text is policy enforcement + audit recording, not external infra or model-dependent decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Attempt manual summary override without override flag; assert rejection and no override applied. Repeat with explicit override flag; assert success plus creation of audit warning record containing actor, round id, timestamp, and override reason.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, PASS finalization requires a review-round identifier generated after the latest fix commit.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure appears in handoff between fix-commit metadata and review-round metadata comparison. REAL-INFRA: real git/subprocess not required if commit IDs/timestamps are represented in domain objects; local wiring catches ordering bugs. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: no. Rejected System: behavior text requires ordering check ('produced after latest fix commit'), not real VCS process behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Create fix commit marker C2 newer than prior review round R1. Try finalize PASS with R1 -> blocked. Create new round R2 linked/generated after C2. Finalize PASS with R2 -> allowed (assuming no unresolved must-fix findings).

behaviors.description: In live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Execution path includes real review-agent run on updated diff; a stub can hide failures where orchestration marks stale/phantom rounds as fresh. Per LLM-DEP default, passing through real model call stays Agentic unless exclusively infra-only. Here correctness depends on actual live round execution freshness in an LLM-involved stage handoff. Rejected Workflow: behavior requires one fresh agentic round gate, not multiple agentic decisions chained for assertion.
behaviors.test_description: Run end-to-end live loop: produce updated diff after fixes, attempt finalize PASS before new agent round -> blocked. Trigger real review-agent round on updated diff, store resulting round id, then finalize -> permitted only with that fresh round id.

behaviors.description: If rounds are exhausted and stored results still contain unresolved MUST-FIX findings, outcome is escalation (not PASS).
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: needs round-budget state + stored findings + gate policy interaction. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP: behavior is based on stored MUST-FIX flags, not model output quality at assertion time. MULTI-STEP: no live multi-agent sequence required by text. Rejected higher levels: behavior text explicitly says 'stored results' and decision policy on exhaustion.
behaviors.test_description: Seed review state at max rounds reached with at least one unresolved MUST-FIX in stored findings. Run final gate decision. Assert status=ESCALATION, PASS=false, and escalation reason references unresolved MUST-FIX after exhaustion.

behaviors.description: In live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires live multi-round sequence with LLM-involved review stages plus terminal gate outcome. MULTI-STEP: yes (multiple agentic rounds sequenced). LLM-DEP: yes (real rounds in live workflow). MOCK-HIDE: stubbing rounds can miss real carryover/handoff failures across rounds. Rejected Agentic: text requires 'multi-round review workflow' exhaustion behavior across rounds, not a single model step.
behaviors.test_description: Execute full live pipeline across configured max rounds on evolving diffs. Ensure at least one MUST-FIX remains unresolved in stored results at exhaustion. Assert PASS remains blocked and escalation event/record is emitted at workflow end.
